parameters.prompt: Photorealistic industrial spacecraft: a compact 28 m frontier courier with a blunt faceted pressure hull, broad 16 m beam, 7 m height and a two-deck center body. Armored cockpit glazing near the nose; visible side boarding airlock collar; bilateral modular engine hardpoints but no detached engines. RCS clusters, radiators, heat shielding, landing-gear bays, layered titanium, aluminum and carbon panels, and service hatches. NASA-real engineering, clean neutral studio. Exact same object in every view. No airplane wings or tail, weapons, text, logos, stand, ground or background.

strengths: consistent blunt two-deck spacecraft silhouette across front, rear, and side views
readable armored cockpit and integrated bilateral propulsion modules
explicit side boarding collar suitable for the authored airlock socket
credible layered aerospace materials and maintainable service-panel language
risks: partial neighboring-view fragments appear at two image edges and must not become geometry
generated exterior detail does not own scale, collision, portals, pivots, or pressure topology
candidate geometry still requires dimensional normalization and engine-side validation
